data: {"generalSituation":"A cold front will move across the coastal areas during the day today. Under the influence of the associated northeast monsoon, temperatures over Guangdong will fall today and tomorrow. Meanwhile, upper-air disturbances will bring heavy showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. With the upper-air disturbances departing, the weather will improve slightly over the coast of Guangdong during the weekend to early next week. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260423","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South force 4, becoming northeast force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Showers will increase gradually with a few squally thunderstorms during the day.
